phonetic: 藢胃a瑟蓹蕣藞sa瑟蓹藢ne瑟t
meaning: n.[鍖朷纭鞍閰哥洂(鎴栭叝)
examples: Examples include thiocyanate and perchlorate inhibition of NIS and soy goitrogen interference with organification.
It can also be prepared by reaction of bromochloromethane with sodium thiocyanate to obtain chloromethyl thiocyanate, and then it reacts with 2-mercapto-benzothiazole.
The concentration of sodium thiocyanate is 40% in the reaction solution.
